info.description: Editorial band of 2–6 short words (e.g. 'Anchored. Clear. Sovereign. Yours.') on a contrasting background. Used as a punchy section break in long-form sales pages.

words.description: The words to display, separated by full stops. Example: 'Anchored. Clear. Sovereign. Yours.'. Each word is shown as its own emphasis.

background_colour.description: Hex colour for the band background. Default near-black (#231F20). For light bands try #F5F3EF (cream) or #6E3A5A (plum).

text_colour.description: Hex colour for the words. Default gold (#FAA21B) — looks good on a dark background. For light backgrounds try #6E3A5A (plum).
